mapper.sql: id, parent_id, name, alias, status, recommended, description, image_url, detail, sort, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM edu_major WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY parent_id ASC, sort ASC, id ASC

SELECT FROM edu_major WHERE deleted = 0
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.name}, '%')
AND status = #{query.status}
ORDER BY parent_id ASC, sort ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM edu_major WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM edu_major WHERE name = #{name} AND parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM edu_major WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM edu_course WHERE major_id = #{majorId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM edu_question WHERE major_id = #{majorId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM edu_exam WHERE major_id = #{majorId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_major (parent_id, name, alias, status, recommended, description, image_url, detail, sort, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{name}, #{alias}, #{status}, #{recommended}, #{description}, #{imageUrl}, #{detail}, #{sort}, NOW(), NOW(), #{createBy}, #{updateBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_major SET parent_id = #{parentId}, name = #{name}, alias = #{alias}, status = #{status}, recommended = #{recommended}, description = #{description}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, detail = #{detail}, sort = #{sort}, update_time = NOW(), update_by = #{updateBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE edu_major SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE edu_major SET deleted = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE edu_major SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE edu_major SET recommended = #{recommended} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE edu_major SET parent_id = #{parentId}, sort = #{sort}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM edu_major WHERE deleted = 1 ORDER BY update_time DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM edu_major WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 1
